scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=json-render-contract && npm run build --workspace=server && npm run build --workspace=preview
scripts.typecheck: tsc --noEmit --project json-render-contract/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit --project server/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit --project preview/tsconfig.json
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace=server && npm run test --workspace=preview
scripts.check: npm run format:check && npm run lint && npm run typecheck
scripts.postinstall: npm run build --workspace=json-render-contract && npm run build --workspace=preview
